creator: chinsan.tw@gmail.com
text:
2006/7/11, Cheng-Lung Sung <clsung@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: [NEW PORT] textproc/p5-SGML-DTDParse: Parse an SGML or XML DTD
Hi, clsung:

I had put the latest shar file at:
http://chinsan2.twbbs.org/chinsan/p5-SGML-DTDParse.shar

But, this port depends on ports/100205: [PATCH] security/p5-GSSAPI
Please, commit ports/100205 first, otherwise we may recive krisbot's
notice mail. :p

chinsan
